text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Friday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, December 27. You have an architecture review at 11 AM, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Sure thing! He is doing so well. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Reviewing our household budget today. We are comparing school districts in Frisco to find the best neighborhood. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. Liberty Elementary has excellent reviews. The neighborhood near it is highly recommended. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Just wanted to mention that working on the roadmap slides for Q4. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. That sounds critical. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has scheduling portal. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. I've noted that. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping scheduling portal in the MVP. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Bedtime can be a challenge. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Went for a run around the neighborhood. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! Great consistency with running. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: I checked the telemetry feeds. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: He is doing so well. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: I can run some projections for you. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Got it, Mike. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, I'm reviewing the secure messaging specs for Vertex Health. Mentoring Anika Patel on how to handle Q4 planning tradeoffs with Greg. We need to back this up with solid performance metrics.
title: Work Update

text: I can help with that. Encourage her to lead the next tradeoff discussion. It's a great growth opportunity for a junior PM. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Toddlers are full of energy. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Went for a run around the neighborhood. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. That's good medical feedback. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Reading scientific papers late tonight. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. Space science and tech is a great focus. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Busy day at Vertex Health. Got document checklists ready for the mortgage refinance. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
